name: Fruity Spice Bars
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup + 2 tbsp firm packed brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. In a small mixing bowl, sift flour, apple pie spice, baking soda, and baking powder together. Add oats, stirring to combine; set aside.
2. In a medium mixing bowl, cream together brown sugar and margarine until thoroughly combined. Add eggs, one at a time, beating until smooth. Gradually beat in the sifted ingredients. Fold in dried fruit and raisins.
3. Spray an 8 x 8 x 2 baking dish with nonstick cooking spray. Pour batter into baking dish. Bake for 30 minutes, or until toothpick comes out dry.
4. Transfer to wire rack and let cool. Dust top with confectioners sugar. Cut into 8 equally sized bars.
Each serving provides: 1/2 Fruit; 1 fat; 1/4 protein; 1/2 bread; 30 Calories.
